components.name: App Header
components.description: Main application header bar. Contains ShopPulse logo, Navigation Menu instance (6-item pill tab bar, desktop only), action buttons (palette, theme, bell with notification dot, user avatar with online indicator), and greeting row with search box. Responsive across Desktop (1440), Tablet (768), and Mobile (375) breakpoints. Page property changes which nav tab is active.
